name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, state, messages, log
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES
  participants, votes, state, messages, log

Init ==
  /\ participants = {1, 2, ..., N}
  /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "unknown"]
  /\ state = "init"
  /\ messages = {}
  /\ log = {}

Next ==
  \/ /\ state = "init"
     /\ state' = "preparing"
        /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare"]) \* Send Prepare to all participants
        /\ \E p \in participants: votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "unknown"]
     \/ /\ state = "preparing"
        /\ \E p \in participants: votes[p] = "unknown"
           /\ state' = "preparing"
              /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare"]) \* Send Prepare to all participants
           \/ /\ state' = "committing"
              /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "yes" \* All participants voted yes
                            FORALL p \in participants: votes[p] = "yes"]
              /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit"]) \* Send Commit to all participants
           \/ /\ state' = "aborting"
              /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "no" \* At least one participant voted no
                            FORALL p \in participants: votes[p] = "no"]
              /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort"]) \* Send Abort to all participants
     \/ /\ state = "committing"
        /\ state' = "committing"
           /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit"]) \* Send Commit to all participants
        \/ /\ state' = "finished"
           /\ log' = Append(log, [sender |-> "coordinator", type |-> "Commit"])
     \/ /\ state = "aborting"
        /\ state' = "aborting"
           /\ messages' = Append(messages, [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort"]) \* Send Abort to all participants
        \/ /\ state' = "finished"
           /\ log' = Append(log, [sender |-> "coordinator", type |-> "Abort"])
     \/ /\ state = "finished"
        /\ state' = "finished"
           /\ messages' = {}
        \/ /\ state' = "finished"
           /\ log' = Append(log, [sender |-> "coordinator", type |-> "Finished"])

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, state, messages, log>>

==

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N |-> 0..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N |-> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = LEFT(i)
        /\ states[i] = "eating"
  \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
        /\ states[i] = "thinking"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, full, empty

Init == /\ queue = <<>>
        /\ full = FALSE
        /\ empty = TRUE

Next == \/ /\ full = FALSE
          /\ queue' = Append(queue, 1)
          /\ empty' = FALSE
          /\ full' = Len(queue') = K
        \/ /\ empty = FALSE
          /\ queue' = Tail(queue)
          /\ full' = FALSE
          /\ empty' = Len(queue') = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<queue, full, empty>>

---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers :
              /\ r \in readers
              /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in Readers :
                  /\ r \notin readers
                  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


VARIABLES file, chunks, sent, lost, retries, done
MAX_RETRIES == 3
CHUNK_SIZE == 1024

\* Helper definitions
chunkSize == CHUNK_SIZE
chunkCount == Len(chunks)

\* Initialize the sender state
Init ==
  /\ file \in Seq(0..255)
  /\ chunks = [i \in 1..chunkCount |-> SubSeq(file, (i-1)*chunkSize + 1, Min(i*chunkSize, Len(file)))]
  /\ sent = {}
  /\ lost = {}
  /\ retries = [i \in 1..chunkCount |-> 0]
  /\ done = FALSE

\* Next-state relation
Next ==
  \/ \* Send a new chunk
     /\ \E i \in 1..chunkCount : i \notin sent /\ i \notin lost
     /\ sent' = sent \cup {i}
     /\ retries' = [retries EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
     /\ lost' = lost
     /\ done' = FALSE
  \/ \* Retransmit a lost chunk
     /\ \E i \in 1..chunkCount : i \in lost /\ retries[i] < MAX_RETRIES
     /\ sent' = sent
     /\ lost' = lost
     /\ retries' = [retries EXCEPT ![i] = retries[i] + 1]
     /\ done' = FALSE
  \/ \* All chunks sent and no pending retransmissions
     /\ sent = 1..chunkCount
     /\ lost = {}
     /\ retries = [i \in 1..chunkCount |-> 0]
     /\ done' = TRUE
  \/ \* All chunks sent but some lost and retries exhausted
     /\ sent = 1..chunkCount
     /\ \E i \in 1..chunkCount : i \in lost /\ retries[i] >= MAX_RETRIES
     /\ retries' = [i \in 1..chunkCount |-> 0]
     /\ done' = TRUE
  \/ \* Simulate message loss
     /\ \E i \in 1..chunkCount : i \in sent /\ i \notin lost
     /\ lost' = lost \cup {i}
     /\ sent' = sent
     /\ retries' = retries
     /\ done' = FALSE

\* Invariant: retries never exceed MAX_RETRIES
TypeOK ==
  /\ \A i \in 1..chunkCount : retries[i] <= MAX_RETRIES

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent, lost, retries, done>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
        /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
        /\ \E j \in 1..N \ {i} : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![j] = offsets[j] + (clocks[i] - clocks[j])]
        /\ \E k \in 1..N : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![k] = offsets[k] + (clocks[k] - Avg(clocks))]
        /\ \E l \in 1..N : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![l] = offsets[l] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[l])]
        /\ \E m \in 1..N : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![m] = offsets[m] + (Avg(clocks) - clocks[m])]

Avg(c) == Sum(c) \div Len(c)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
       /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLE free, allocated, p

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \notin DOMAIN allocated
          /\ \E p \in free:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in free: p']
              /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in DOMAIN allocated:
          /\ \E p \in allocated[c]:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in allocated[c]: p']
              /\ free' = free \cup {p}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \subseteq [Client -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in DOMAIN allocated: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated: \A p1, p2 \in allocated[c]: p1 # p2

name: Dekker's Algorithm
Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
       \/ \A n, m \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
